query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A close-up of an orange rose bloom with layered petals transitioning from deep red-orange at the center to bright orange and yellow at the outer edges. Dark brown leaves and thin stems appear in the upper and left portions behind the flower, while the lower area shows dark brown and muted purple tones against a pale gray background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up of an orange rose bloom rendered with severely degraded detail, where fine textures are absent and surfaces dissolve into large, flat patches of solid color. Layered petals transition from deep red-orange at the center to bright orange and yellow at the outer edges, but lack definition and appear as blocky, faceted shapes rather than smooth organic forms. Dark leaves and stems behind the flower similarly lose clarity, turning into indistinct brown and purple masses against a pale gray backdrop, so that small structures and natural features resolve into ambiguity.
